tasks.title: Job Search System Upgrade — Phase 1 (Kanban + Rating + ATS Format Check)
tasks.notes: COMPLETED 2026-05-13. (1) JOBSEARCH-001: Rex implemented 5-stage Teal funnel (Bookmarked → Preparing → Applied → Interviewing → Offer) + 4 terminal columns (Accepted/Rejected/Ghosted/Archived) with idempotent legacy stage migration on load. (2) JOBSEARCH-002: 1-5 star excitement rating per job card, sortable, localStorage-persisted, ARIA radiogroup. (3) JOBSEARCH-008: Jasmin built scripts/ats_format_check.py — 6 checks (tables/images/columns/headers-footers/fonts/date consistency); Cole's persona updated with mandatory pre-archive ATS check. Self-test: 3/3 existing CVs PASS (5/1/0 each). Rex 41/41 smoke tests PASS. Vera QA: 59/59 PASS WITH NOTES — CV↔Job sync preserved end-to-end, XSS guard intact, WCAG AA contrast clear (11.08:1 filled / 3.76:1 unfilled / 9.39:1 focus ring). Two Phase 2 polish notes filed (color palette didn't grow with 9 columns; modal uses native select while cards use bespoke widget). Reports: rex_jobsearch_phase1_done.md, jasmin_ats_checker_done.md, vera_jobsearch_phase1_qa.md.

tasks.title: Job Search System Upgrade — Phase 2 (Sub-tasks + Reminders + ATS Score Engine)
tasks.notes: COMPLETED 2026-05-14. (1) JOBSEARCH-003: Rex prep checklist (5 items: Identified recruiter / Customized CV / Sent connection / Got referral / Cover letter ready) with compact x/5 indicator on Bookmarked/Preparing cards + full checklist in modal. (2) JOBSEARCH-004: Rex follow-up date per job + colored badge (red overdue / gold upcoming / gray distant) + Overdue Follow-ups banner at top of Jobs tab with clickable scroll-to chips and inline +3d snooze. Don't-nag rule: bookmarked/terminal stages excluded from overdue alerts. (3) JOBSEARCH-005: Yoni ATS keyword match engine — pure JS, n-gram tokenizer + stemmer + weighted score + title match. New ATS Match tab in dashboard with CV picker dropdown, two textareas, Analyze button, score pill (red <50/yellow 50-74/green ≥75), gap list, noise list (collapsible). Engine retuned by Jasmin (trigram 1.6→1.15, bigram 1.3→1.10, stop-word interior filter, soft-match for unigram-covered n-grams). Scores: tailored CVs 39-43% post-retune (was 28-32%). Self-match 100%, cross-domain 17%, empty 0%. KEY FINDING: Elbit CVs genuinely lack JD vocabulary (artillery/c4i/smart sensing/cyber) — actionable for Cole. Rex: 84/84 smoke PASS. Vera: 194/194 jsdom PASS + 19/23 WCAG AA contrast PASS (4 decorative chrome cases noted as Phase 3 polish). Jasmin: engine logic + security CLEAN (no XSS, ReDoS, proto-pollution). Compute time 3-11ms. Reports: rex_jobsearch_phase2_done.md, yoni_ats_match_engine_done.md, jasmin_ats_engine_qa.md, vera_jobsearch_phase2_qa.md.

tasks.title: Job Search System Upgrade — Phase 3 (Contacts + AI Toolkit + URL Parser)
tasks.notes: COMPLETED 2026-05-15. All 4 features shipped + QA-approved. (1) JOBSEARCH-006 Contacts: Rex re-applied after worktree-glitch loss — contacts CRUD per job, LinkedIn links, sort by lastContacted, contact-count badge, XSS-safe; 12 functions verified on disk via grep. (2) JOBSEARCH-007 AI Toolkit: Yoni — 6 copy-paste prompt generators (networking, coffee chat, interview Qs, thank-you, salary negotiation, LinkedIn connect), job/CV auto-fill, XSS-safe via textarea.value. (3) JOBSEARCH-009 Today's Snapshot: Rex — 4-stat strip atop Jobs tab (jobs added vs 5/week target, applications sent, overdue count, next interview), color-coded cells. (4) JOBSEARCH-010 Import Job: Mack — scripts/job_url_parser.py (JSON-LD-first, LinkedIn live OK, Indeed 403 graceful) + 2-mode dashboard panel. Vera QA: 166/166 jsdom PASS, 22/29 WCAG AA contrast (7 fails are carry-forward decorative chrome from prior phases). Mack's import seeds contacts:[]/createdAt matching Rex's model — no integration drift. KEY LESSON saved as memory: parallel agents on same file lost work once (feedback_parallel_agent_file_conflicts). Reports: rex_jobsearch_phase3_REDO_done.md, yoni_ai_toolkit_done.md, mack_job_url_parser_done.md, vera_jobsearch_phase3_qa.md.

tasks.title: BuildAR Pro — pre-build research (AR libs, Expo vs RN, schema delta)
tasks.notes: COMPLETED 2026-05-10. Full report at owner_inbox/research/buildar_prebuild_research.md. Key findings: (1) AR lib: ViroReact — only option with AR+non-AR fallback as first-class APIs, iOS+Android, Expo config plugin, active (v2.54.0 April 2026); (2) Expo path: managed prebuild (expo prebuild + config plugin) not bare — ViroReact doesn't run in Expo Go but works cleanly with prebuild, eject cost later is low; (3) PNPM: use node-linker=hoisted for mobile workspace + Expo metro monorepo config; (4) Schema: existing schema is guides/image_targets — completely different from new plan. Start fresh, carry forward Silas's RLS patterns + auto-profile trigger.
